title: WUBEN E7 1800 Lumen Torch Light with Magnet - Super Bright 6 Modes EDC Flashlight, Typ-C Rechargeable LED Flash Light; IP68 Pocket Flashlight for Headlamp Use, Rescue, Camping
features: PERSONALIZED EDC FLASHLIGHT: WUBEN E7 is a multi-purpose EDC flashlight that shows your personality. The appearance is stylish and trendy, equipped with P9 high color rendering 6500K LED lamp beads, which can provide high output up to 1800 lumens and 175° ultra-wide-angle floodlight.It is also a very stable headlamp; you only need to fit it into the ergonomic headband; freeing your hands while still providing a stable light.

Super Bright 6 MODES : WUBEN E7 rechargeable flashlights have 6 lighting modes: High/Med/Low/Super Bright/Strobe/SOS, with memory function；Click the switch and long press to trigger the gear selection; double click to light up the super bright mode; three clicks to burst flash mode; four consecutive clicks to lock the flashlight，Avoid turning on the flashlight by accidental touch;

IP68 WATERPROOF & REECHARGEABLE:The overall body of the flashlight has a true waterproof design inside, made of aircraft-grade aluminum alloy with micro-arc oxidation process. If you forget to cover our charging hole for something and accidentally drop it into water, it will not damage the inside of our flashlight. Equipped with 1100 mAh rechargeable battery, it only takes 1.5 hours to fully charge. Red and blue battery indicator light let you know the battery level at any time.

MULTI-FUNCTION EDC FLASHLIGHT: WUBEN E7 flashlight is an EDC flashlight with a strong magnet on the bottom to firmly hold iron objects, also has a hugging clip on the back to easily attach it to jacket pockets, backpacks, gears, waistbands; you can also put it into the headlamp clip (not included) to use it as a headlamp; you can plug in a Typ-c cable to control the use of the flashlight through the gesture remote sensor (not included), it's easy to carry and simple to use;

YOU WILL GET:E7 Flashlight × 1, Rechargeable Battery × 1, Type-C Charging Cable × 1, Spare O-Ring × 2, User's Manual, Warranty Card × 1; If you have any questions about how to use the product or how to mix and match parts, please contact us!
